instructions.text: In a quiet place, pray for the Lord's guidance.
Reflect on a recent moment of gratitude.

content_master.title: Offer prayers of faith for the five.
content_master.scripture_1: James 5:15-16 - The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective.
content_master.devotional_body:

content_master.scripture_2: 1 Timothy 2: 1, 3-4 - I urge, then, first of all, that petitions, prayers, intercession and thanksgiving be made for all people— for kings and all those in authority, that we may live peaceful and quiet lives in all godliness and holiness. This is good, and pleases God our Savior, who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.

content_master.title: Offer prayers of praise for the five.
content_master.scripture_1: Philippians 1:3-4 - I thank my God every time I remember you. In all my prayers for all of you, I always pray with joy.
